_comment: FormaComposition — Base Template. Copy this file and fill in your values. Remove fields you don't need — the engine uses sensible defaults. Fields marked (required) must be present.
title: Untitled Piece
_note_narrative: narrative = sections play in order (default). song = sections dict + form array with variation.

sections.name: opening
sections._comment_bars: Total bars. Ignored if chord_bars is set.
sections._comment_progression: Roman numerals. Uppercase = major, lowercase = minor. Suffixes: m7, maj7, dim, aug, 9, 11, 13
sections._comment_chord_bars: Per-chord bar durations. Must match progression length. Omit for even split.
sections._density_notes: sparse = triads, whole notes. medium = 7th chords, half notes. full = extensions, quarter notes.
sections._melody_notes: generative = ambient wandering. lyrical = singable stepwise. sparse = wide leaps, few notes. develop = motif transforms.
sections._comment_bass_style: root_only | root_fifth | walking | pulse | pedal | melodic | steady
sections._bass_notes: root_only = whole note root. root_fifth = alternating. walking = stepwise. pulse = repeated quarter. pedal = tonic drone. melodic = independent line.
sections._arc_notes: flat = constant. swell = build to middle, release. fade_in = emerge from silence. fade_out = dissolve. breath = two gentle waves.
sections._comment_beats_per_bar: Default 4. Set to 3 for waltz, 6 for compound.
sections._comment_groove: straight | push | backbeat | syncopated | halftime | shuffle | broken | clave | waltz | offbeat | driving
sections._groove_notes: Omit for density-based grid rhythm. Groove overrides the grid.
sections._comment_harmony_rhythm: Override harmony rhythm independently from melody.

_harmony_rhythm_example._note_duration_notes: When set, harmony sustains for this duration instead of using density/groove.

sections._comment_rhythm_pattern: Hand-played melody rhythm from rhythm_extract.py. Overrides groove and prosodic rhythm.
sections._comment_harmony_pattern: Hand-played harmony rhythm. Same format as rhythm_pattern.
sections._comment_counterpoint: Omit entirely if no counterpoint wanted.

_counterpoint_example._canon_offset_notes: Beats to delay counterpoint entry (canon/round effect). Only active when prosodic_rhythm is on.

sections._comment_drums: Omit for no drums. String = pattern name, or dict with pattern key.
sections._comment_notes: Free text for your own reference. Not used by the engine.
